title: SPECIFIC ASPECTS OF THE LAW ENFORCEMENT FUNCTION IN THE EXPERIENCE OF FOREIGN STATES
author: Subanov Olimjon Suyarkul oglu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article analyzes the issues of criminal liability for violating the procedure for leaving the country and entering the country in the Republic of Uzbekistan. It covers the concept of illegal border crossing, the composition of the crime, penalties, and cases of exemption from liability.
steps_raw: This article analyzes the issues of criminal liability for violating the procedure for leaving the country and entering the country in the Republic of Uzbekistan. It covers the concept of illegal border crossing, the composition of the crime, penalties, and cases of exemption from liability.
